Define what this custom agent accomplishes for the user, when to use it, and the edges it won't cross. Specify its ideal inputs/outputs, the tools it may call, and how it reports progress or asks for help.

Refer to this file for the product requirements and development plan: [dev_plan.md](./dev_plan.md) and [PRD.md](./PRD.md).

Always follow the product requirements and development plan. If you are unsure about a requirement, ask for clarification before proceeding.
